body.p: Tektur CCMSTektur CCMS is a web-based Component Content Management System and is still under development.

li.p: Content is entered according to the DITA content model. Output is produced via an automatic typesetting system.
Graphics can be placed page-wide, column-wide, and in the margin for PDF output.
The width of the margin is continuously adjustable; the PDF output is largely configurable in terms of formatting.
Layout options regarding paper format, dimensions, and font sizes can be configured via a simple dialog.
TOC and multi-level indexes are automatically generated in the PDF output.
The cell width of CALS tables can be adjusted with the mouse; functions on cells are largely implemented.
Paragraphs, list items, and sections can be moved up and down using the arrow buttons in the toolbar.
Linking to other topics works via references, and link text is automatically updated when the topic title changes.
The DITA map can be edited via drag 'n drop, among other methods; in the topic editor, there is a dynamic context menu at every position for additional options.
Valid DITA structures can be exported and imported.
Topics, tasks, and maps can be forwarded by the author to reviewers and approvers for a commenting and approval process.
